description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular design. The front facade features a main entry door with a small overhang and a driveway leading to a carport, partially covered by a green awning. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens to a fenced backyard with a prominent white tree and a patio area. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, with some sections painted black for contrast. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway and a small landscaped garden area.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, carport with green awning, driveway, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, white tree, patio area, and the back wall with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the brick wall, backyard, and the transition between the driveway and garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the carport, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard and house interior.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent carport with green awning
